description_long: This object is a whole cucumber, elongated and cylindrical with a slightly tapered end and a rounded base. Its surface is a deep, glossy green with subtle lighter green striations running lengthwise, giving it a natural, fresh appearance. The skin appears firm and slightly bumpy, typical of a fresh cucumber, with a slight sheen indicating moisture. The ends are intact, with one end showing a small, circular stem scar. The cucumber's overall shape is straight with a gentle curve, and it appears unblemished and uniform in color. There are no visible cuts, stickers, or other modifications on its surface.
description: A whole, fresh cucumber with a glossy, deep green skin and subtle lighter green striations. The surface is firm, slightly bumpy, and unblemished.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the cucumber, highlighting its straight, cylindrical shape and glossy green skin.
description_view_1: End view displaying the rounded base and the circular stem scar, with visible striations radiating from the center.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the full length and consistent coloration of the cucumber.
description_view_3: End view from the tapered tip, showing the slightly pointed end and the continuation of the green striations.
attribute_location: isolated in space with an undefined background
attribute_visible_markings: subtle lighter green striations running lengthwise
